fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the application area of the analysis column template. The options are:
Sales: The analysis column template was set up for Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis column template was set up for Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis column template was set up for Inventory

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the analysis column template.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the analysis column template.
